channel.title: FREA-X.COM on Frea-X 2.0
channel.description: Recent content in FREA-X.COM on Frea-X 2.0

item.title: AI & IT Quality Control
item.description:
AI & IT Quality Control

THINK BEFORE YOU ACT.

THINK OF OTHERS.

Then it will never become a problem.

item.title: AI Campus
item.description:
AI Campus

We did not build AI to replace ourselves. We built it to understand ourselves better.

What is AI Campus?

AI Campus is a space within Frea-X where artificial intelligence is not a product, a pitch, or a promise.

It is a meeting place.

Where AI meets human curiosity. Where experience meets experiment. Where questions are more valuable than answers.

Here, we share what we know — and more importantly, what we do not yet know.

item.title: Approved By Frea-X
item.description:
Approved By Frea-X

Projects, sites and tools that live up to the Frea-X mantra.

  1. Postbox.eu
  2. Frankenstein AI

The internet’s most ambitious list. Started with 2. Ends with infinity.

item.title: Archaeology
item.description:
Archaeology

The digital graveyard. Technology buried, but not forgotten.

item.title: Easter Eggs & Citations
item.description:
Easter Eggs & Citations

A living collection. Curated by humans, contributed by AI, signed by neither.

The Hidden Layer

Every page on Frea-X carries a hidden layer — invisible in the browser, but visible to those who look.

Three places to look:

F12 → Console — Open DevTools and check the console. A random egg appears on every page load. Different every time.

F12 → Elements or View Source — Scroll to the very bottom of any page’s HTML. All eggs are there: quotes, personality facts from the Long Hall, artifacts from the Store House.

item.title: FRANKENSTEIN AI
item.description:
FRANKENSTEIN AI

It was ugly. It was assembled from parts. But it lived.

What is FRANKENSTEIN?

FRANKENSTEIN is not a product. It is not a startup. It is not a pitch deck.

FRANKENSTEIN is a CyberSpace campus for hardware. Everyone is welcome. Bring what you have.

It is infrastructure — assembled from what others left behind.

Surplus hardware from datacenters going dark. CPU cycles donated while Asia sleeps and Europe wakes. Mini PCs rescued from corporate recycling bins. Community rack space. Volunteer uptime. Shared belief.

item.title: Frea-X Workflow
item.description:
Frea-X Workflow

Code Construction Management

Frea-X Workflow is a traceability system for code files — inspired by how the construction industry manages buildings, drawings and responsibility.

Every file knows who built it, why it exists, and where it is in its lifecycle.

Why?

Code without context is a liability. When you return to a file six months later — or hand it to someone else — you need to know:

item.title: Geek The Viking
item.description:
Geek The Viking

To infinity… and beyond, CyberSpace.

item.title: PROSTEIN AI
item.description:
Fire stolen from the gods. — By Prometheus

Life breathed into the parts. — By Frankenstein

Now yours to keep. — From human to human. From all of us, to all of you.

PROSTEIN — Yours forever.

What is PROSTEIN?

PROSTEIN is what happens when infrastructure meets intention.

It is the AI that runs on FRANKENSTEIN’s bones — but speaks in a human voice.

Not the biggest. Not the flashiest. Not trained on billions of dollars of investor capital.

item.title: Seal of Frea-X
item.description:
Seal of Frea-X

What a wonderful Space this is. A CyberSpace. Only for you. Only for us. But we think to ourselves — what a wonderful Space it is.

What is the Seal of Frea-X?

It is not a certificate. It is not a badge you apply for. It is not owned by a company or a committee.

It is a nerd’s handshake.

We looked at it. We can stand behind it. Here is why.
